title: read_verilog: allow width detection of unreachable ternary operation branches to fail

features.name: ternary operation with unreachable out-of-bounds array access
features.description: Code should include a ternary operation with a constant-true condition where the unreachable branch accesses an array with a negative index

features.name: ternary operation with unreachable out-of-bounds array access (constant false condition)
features.description: Code should include a ternary operation with a constant-false condition where the unreachable branch accesses an array with an index exceeding bounds

features.name: unpacked array with single element
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration with a single element (zero width unpacked dimension)
